title: Game On: The Unstoppable Rise of Women's Sport
original_title: Game On: The Unstoppable Rise of Women's Sport
overview: Follows international player Poppy Cleall’s journey to the Rugby World Cup 2022, with former England footballer and boxer Stacey Copeland exploring the impact of England winning last summer’s Euros, and the powerful Katie Taylor vs Amanda Serrano headline boxing bout at Madison Square Garden in New York.
